formulas.name: windowClass(c,s)

variables.name: requiredWindowFit(c,s)
variables.description: Resolved window fit where 2 = inside required window, 1 = inside approved variance window, 0 = outside window but still visible by policy.

notes: This band is ordered before all convenience terms.
It must not be reintroduced into `baseUtility(c,s)`.

formulas.name: u_modality(c,s)

variables.name: modalityCompatibility
variables.description: Whether the candidate modality is clinically and operationally compatible.

notes: The compatibility check is explicit, not inferred from route-local copy.

formulas.name: u_access(c,s)

variables.name: accessibilityFit(c,s)
variables.description: Normalized patient accessibility and burden fit under the current case constraints.

notes: Accessibility fit is a normalized feature and remains visible in the explanation tuple.

formulas.name: u_travel(c,s)

variables.name: travelMinutes(c,s)
variables.description: Estimated travel burden for the patient.

variables.name: tau_travel
variables.description: Travel-time decay constant versioned in the rank plan.

notes: Travel convenience cannot outrank the window class band.

formulas.name: u_wait(c,s)

variables.name: waitMinutes(s)
variables.description: Time from current evaluation to the candidate start time.

variables.name: tau_wait
variables.description: Wait-time decay constant versioned in the rank plan.

notes: Wait fit is within-band only and does not replace the required-window rule.

formulas.name: u_fresh(c,s)

variables.name: stalenessMinutes(s)
variables.description: Age of the source snapshot at evaluation time.

variables.name: tau_fresh
variables.description: Freshness decay constant versioned in the rank plan.

notes: Freshness contributes to utility and separately informs source admission and uncertainty.

formulas.name: baseUtility(c,s)
formulas.expression: w_modality * u_modality(c,s) + w_access * u_access(c,s) + w_travel * u_travel(c,s) + w_wait * u_wait(c,s) + w_fresh * u_fresh(c,s)
notes: Window fit is deliberately excluded to prevent double-counting.
Weights version with the persisted rank plan.

formulas.name: uncertaintyRadius(c,s)

variables.name: epsilon_alpha(c,s)
variables.description: Calibrated uncertainty from trust class, staleness, duplicate-capacity collision risk, and recent adapter drift.

notes: Uncertainty is persisted as proof, not hidden in copy.
The uncertainty model versions separately from the rank plan.

formulas.name: robustFit(c,s)

variables.name: lambda_uncertainty
variables.description: Penalty multiplier versioned in the same rank plan.

notes: Robust fit is the within-band score used after window class and trust tier.

dominanceFrontierRule.weakDominanceDefinition: If s1 weakly dominates s2 on the comparator tuple and strictly improves at least one coordinate, s2 is removed from patient-offerable and direct-commit frontiers.

sourceTrustTiers.notes: Trusted supply may join patient-offerable and direct-commit frontiers when routing and variance also allow it.
Degraded supply may remain visible only for diagnostic or callback-fallback reasoning. It is never ordinary direct-booking truth.
Quarantined supply is excluded from bookable and patient-offerable frontiers. It survives only as diagnostic evidence or a typed policy exception.

separationLaws: Routing, approved variance, and capacity admission decide patient-offerable and direct-commit frontiers.
Service-obligation and practice-visibility rules may mint ledgers, exceptions, and acknowledgement debt but may not silently re-score, hide, or reorder candidates.
Window fit remains a separate hard band and may not be double-counted inside utility.
Uncertainty remains a persisted proof field rather than a route-local copy heuristic.
